close_reason: Extracted semver utilities to nix/lib/semver.nix and updated rust-deps-cell.nix to use the new library
description:
The file nix/buck2/rust-deps-cell.nix contains semver parsing and comparison utilities (lines 82-127) that are duplicated/could be reused elsewhere. These should be extracted into a shared Nix library (e.g., nix/lib/semver.nix) for reuse across the codebase.

Current location: nix/buck2/rust-deps-cell.nix
Functions to extract:
- parseSemver: Parse version string into {major, minor, patch, prerelease}
- compareSemver: Compare two parsed versions
- compareVersionStrings: Compare version strings directly
- semverSortDesc: Sort comparator for descending order
title: Extract semver utilities from rust-deps-cell.nix into reusable library
